notes: Fix: mobile projection page showed only the first (Item) column, rest blank. Root cause: a leftover CSS rule from the old 3-month-swipe approach — '#budgetGrid [data-col] { display: none; }' — was still hiding ALL value cells. In v46 that approach was replaced with native horizontal scroll, and the JS that used to reveal a 3-column window (#_projColRules) was stubbed to a no-op. So the hide rule stayed active with nothing to un-hide the cells. Removed the orphaned hide rule. Also added mobile colgroup width overrides (label 150px, month 130px) so table-layout: auto matches the intended cell widths instead of inheriting the larger desktop col widths.
